patterns.name: multi_item_print_qr
patterns.scope: current item in repeated list or Collection context
validation: QR control exists inside print page
QR control is inside repeated item/list context
QR value is current item/current row scoped or field-bound

patterns.name: single_item_print_qr
validation: QR control exists inside print page
QR control is current record scoped or field-bound

fallback.allowed: field-bound business code text such as Vendor Code, Quote Number, Inventory Code, or Serial Number
fallback.notAllowed: static placeholder URLs or unbound placeholder QR values
